description.value:
The hottest socials on the infosphere might change with time, but the way those spaces fill up with drama and gossip is a truth that lasts forever. Luckily, you've been saving every embarrassing holo and compromising remark you've found on the infosphere to your personal archives for centuries.

You can roll a Computers check instead of an Intimidation check when you use the [[/act coerce skill=computers]] action, threatening to share copies of an embarrassing infosphere moment from the target's past. On a success, in addition to the normal effects of Coerce, the target is temporarily immune to any additional Coerce attempts from you for 24 hours. On a failure, they're instead immune for 1 week, and on a critical failure, they're immune for 1 month.
